dream-s-end.name: Dream's End
dream-s-end.description: A sacred staff sealed away in the deepest reaches of the dream world. Its light is said to be capable of eradicating not only nightmares, but the entire dream world itself.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs if a Mori is on the allied team, including reinforcements.

sword-of-liberty.name: Sword of Liberty
sword-of-liberty.description:
A phantom blade said to appear before one who has achieved the greatest freedom in the world.
When it manifests, it is always accompanied by loud and triumphant music, so despite its supposed mystique, it has been witnessed by surprisingly many.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if any 2 units on the battlefield are Frostburned.

harmonicus.name: Harmonicus
harmonicus.description:
A melody once played in memory of a departed friend. Its lingering resonance crystallized into this jeweled mace.
The moment it is grasped, memories sleeping deep within one's heart begin to stir, and the wielder is strengthened by the bond of their most precious friendship.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if this unit's HP is at 90%+.

star-rocker.name: Star Rocker
star-rocker.description:
A legendary electric guitar, passed down in an unbroken line among generations of top idols.
It is said to have existed from ancient times, far before the invention of electric guitars, and it carries within it the memory of every sound ever made on this world.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have Stealth.

empyrean-spear.name: Empyrean Spear
empyrean-spear.description: A spear of judgment overflowing with celestial light. The unerring radiance of divine judgement resides at its tip.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 50% or less of max HP.

infernum-wing.name: Infernum Wing
infernum-wing.description: A greataxe infused with the flames of hell. Every swing unleashes wings of flame upon the enemy, turning them to ash.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that have 50% or less of max HP or have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

ragnarok-breaker.name: Ragnarok Breaker
ragnarok-breaker.description: A forbidden weapon that houses thunder powerful enough to slay even gods. With every swing, the end of the world draws one step nearer.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit is sleeping.

astral-lotus.name: Astral Lotus
astral-lotus.description: A beautiful flower staff that blooms under the night sky. Every time it loses a petal, another life comes to an end.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

himezuru-blade.name: Himezuru Blade
himezuru-blade.description: The vermilion blade gleams in the darkness of night, shrouded in divine radiance as it flickers like a crane's wings.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Poison Eater or Stealth Strike type active skills.

nether-owl-axe.name: Nether Owl Axe
nether-owl-axe.description: An axe fashioned after the wings of an owl that embodies darkness. It is said that its cry is like a whisper in the night, and anyone who hears it will immediately lose their life.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against Light units.

heavenly-grace.name: Heavenly Grace
heavenly-grace.description: A mace that descended from the heavens, carrying the light of love. It is said to kindle a quiet, gentle compassion in the hearts of all who touch it.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if 2 or more allies have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

hildrgreipr.name: Hildrgreipr
hildrgreipr.description: Twin blades bearing the name of a legendary Valkyrie. Their light shines not with hatred, but only for the sake of the one they are meant to protect.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks if there is a Guardian among enemies.

celestial-wrath.name: Celestial Wrath
celestial-wrath.description: At the wielder's slightest whim, its lightning can become either divine salvation or the herald of annihilation.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that have a current TU of 50 or less and units that have a current TU of 150 or more.

balmung.name: Balmung
balmung.description: The sword wielded by the legendary dragonslayer against the dragon of calamity. Its blade has been bathed in the blood of countless dragons.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks if 2 or more allies have the Burn status effect.

umbra-banisher.name: Umbra Banisher
umbra-banisher.description: The purer the wielder's heart, the deeper the darkness this blade can purge.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Poison Eater or Dream Hunter type active skills.

lucent-crystal-ark.name: Lucent Crystal Ark
lucent-crystal-ark.description: An axe born from starlight crystallized upon a tranquil lake. It mirrors the heart of its wielder—at times embracing light, and at times steeped in darkness.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that have not defeated any units with attacks while on the battlefield.

frost-sepulcher.name: Frost Sepulcher
frost-sepulcher.description: When this earth-shattering sword is swung down—the snow ceases, sound vanishes, and only a white death remains.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more enemies are Sleeping or Burning.

sancho-panza.name: Sancho Panza
sancho-panza.description: Entrusted to the foolish yet brave knight on the day she left her village, this spear is so heavy that no ordinary person can wield it.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 7% reduction to TU costs if all units on the battlefield have the Burn status effect.

nocturne-dirge.name: Nocturne Dirge
nocturne-dirge.description: The axe bears the soul of a king long laid to rest. Even without a master, it ceaselessly craves blood.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are Lethal Poisoned.

riot-of-blossoms.name: Riot of Blossoms
riot-of-blossoms.description: When that staff is unleashed, countless petals whirl through the air, weaving together into a white shroud that cloaks death itself.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has a Power Charge.

crushing-bolt.name: Crushing Bolt
crushing-bolt.description: One strike holds the electricity equal to that of a city. Any enemy struck is reduced to ash.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as 2 conjured ally units are on the battlefield.

astral-breaker.name: Astral Breaker
astral-breaker.description: Gleaming in the night sky, its blade can split the skyline in one sweep.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if all enemies are poisoned.

susquehanna.name: Susquehanna
susquehanna.description: A black hammer kept aboard the mysterious captain's ship. Its weight increases each time the captain's worries grow.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 10% as long as 2 enemy units are sleeping.

vermilion-tempest.name: Vermilion Tempest
vermilion-tempest.description: Every time it is swung, it unleashes a strike as beautiful and sharp as autumn leaves dancing in the fall breeze.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against sleeping units.

iron-stand-cleaver.name: Iron Stand Cleaver
iron-stand-cleaver.description: A blade holding the prayer of a certain girl. In tune with her gentle heart, it answers her wish and gleams with a sharp light.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Stealth Strike or Dream Hunter type active skills.

festival-of-ruin.name: Festival of Ruin
festival-of-ruin.description: The hammer of festivities. Its blow will put both the Fool and the Hero to sleep... eternally.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 5% as long as the enemy has 2 or more units that are poisoned or sleeping.

phantom-fang.name: Phantom Fang
phantom-fang.description: A divine axe imbued with the will of the azure spirit dragon. Its strike can rend mountains and shake the heavens.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against burning units.

radiant-silverlight.name: Radiant Silverlight
radiant-silverlight.description: A sacred blade, the symbol and pride of the Silver Knights. Imbued with crystalline radiance, it severs the foulest of evils, restoring azure skies to the heavens.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if all units on the battlefield have the Burn status effect.

zulmat-spear.name: Zulmat Spear
zulmat-spear.description: A spear of darkness born from the void between time. Able to tear through the fabric of time, it draws its victims into oblivion.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

time-sunderer.name: Time Sunderer
time-sunderer.description: The axe that can cut through even the wheel of time.  A single blow can sever fate and break causality itself.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have a current TU of 250 or more.

silencewrought.name: Silencewrought
silencewrought.description: Weapon of the high priest, forged in the Temple of Time. Its strike is so fast, it leaves even sound behind.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if this unit's current TU is 100 or less.

deathmaid-cleaver.name: Deathmaid Cleaver
deathmaid-cleaver.description: The ultimate weapon hidden in the closet of the Kingdom of Greyford's most terrifying maid. If this thing comes out...don't expect to see the light of day.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against Light units.

azure-majesty.name: Azure Majesty
azure-majesty.description: A sacred sword passed down through the generations of the Greyford family. Now, in the hands of its new heir, it sits on the throne gleaming with renewed glory.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as 2 or more enemies are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield.

abyss-fury.name: Abyss Fury
abyss-fury.description: Said to be brought out when the instructor's anger reaches its peak. It's overwhelming intensity causes even giant monsters to tuck their tails between the legs and flee.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy will have 2 or less Spirit after their attack.

imperial-tonitrus.name: Imperial Tonitrus
imperial-tonitrus.description: A spear of judgment carried by the legendary sacred beast. If the wielder's justice is genuine, an onslaught of thunder will rain down from the heavens.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have 100+ TU.

nyx-rod.name: Nyx Rod
nyx-rod.description: A staff bearing the name of the Goddess of Night. Imbued with the light of the black moon, it ends the world, plunging it into silence.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as an enemy unit has Lethal Poison.

nocturne-ros.name: Nocturne Rosé
nocturne-ros.description: An ancient magic sword that is said to bear the curse of the red rose. Those who are cut down by it dance forever at a nightmare banquet.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if this unit has Counter Stance.

wrathbound-blade.name: Wrathbound Blade
wrathbound-blade.description: Ablaze with raging fury, the sword leaves wounds as deep as an anchor in its enemies.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

pyro-gearblade.name: Pyro Gearblade
pyro-gearblade.description: A weapon developed using the cutting-edge technology of the Red Dragon Organization. Its built-in thermoelectric module can instantaneously raise the blade's temperature enough to melt through any target.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more enemies have 200+ TU.

north-star.name: North Star
north-star.description: A paintbrush sent from heaven, transformed into an axe that uses spacetime as its canvas—its every swing like a brushstroke painting the world in new colors.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units if they have another ally with a matching Element on the battlefield.

thunderclaw.name: Thunderclaw
thunderclaw.description: A sword blessed with all the power of a dragon's heart. Glimmering like the stars, the brilliance of its blade can cut through even the deepest darkness.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 7% reduction to TU costs if all units on the battlefield have the Burn status effect.

hellfang.name: Hellfang
hellfang.description: A trident shrouded in a dark aura, the hidden treasure of the demonfolk. Those pierced with its prongs are, without exception, immediately sent to the gates of Hell.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have Mega Healing Burn.

salvator-mundi.name: Salvator Mundi
salvator-mundi.description: A mace embodying the unparalleled spirit of innovation and creativity of a certain genius inventor. It releases astonishing amounts of magic with every swing.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as 2 or more allies are Sleeping.

heaven-s-wrath.name: Heaven's Wrath
heaven-s-wrath.description: A sword once used by a master swordsman revered as the god of war. Its golden blade will never rust, nor will it grow dull.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with active Stun skills or Stealth Strike type active skills.

combat-kiseru.name: Combat Kiseru
combat-kiseru.description: The master thief's trusted weapon. A quality item perfect for bludgeoning enemies and for a quick smoke after a battle.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if there are 4 or more units with the Stealth status effect.

oathkeeper.name: Oathkeeper
oathkeeper.description: A hammer gifted with the blessing of heavens and the power of love and hope. Fueled by the passion of a certain uninhibited bride, it is ready to smash this twisted world to pieces.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as the enemy has 2 or more sleeping units.

depthmaster.name: Depthmaster
depthmaster.description: Beloved weapon of the deity reigning over Erden's seas. Silent and deadly like the ocean depths, it never fails to claim its targets' lives.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs if a Mori is on the allied team, including reinforcements.

akeyozakura.name: Akeyozakura
akeyozakura.description: On nights when the full moon shines as cherry trees scatter their petals, you must stay away from this bridge. It is said to be haunted by a bloodthirsty phantom wielding an axe of extraordinary beauty.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

ice-herald.name: Ice Herald
ice-herald.description: Beware—if you let this hammer's beauty bewitch you, it will shatter your heart like glass, leaving nothing but a cold gravestone in the spot where you fell.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as the enemy has 1 or more poisoned units.

heretic-s-creed.name: Heretic's Creed
heretic-s-creed.description: A dark blade said to be the counterpart to a certain holy sword of legend. Should it ever fall into royal hands, the world will meet a miserable end.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if all enemies are sleeping.

hellbound.name: Hellbound
hellbound.description: A mace confined beneath Avalon. The deeper its wielder's sins run, the brighter its ominous scarlet glow becomes.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit is burning.

luminatus.name: Luminatus
luminatus.description: A hammer sealed within a certain sanctuary once visited by King Arthur. They say that whoever manages to set it free will learn the king's most carefully hidden memories.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

iseult.name: Iseult
iseult.description: A beautiful axe named after a lady that the founder of the House of Tristan fell in love with. Despite its delicate appearance, it is capable of delivering some truly barbaric violence.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that are sleeping or at max HP.

ironheart.name: Ironheart
ironheart.description: Beloved weapon of the most brutal knight of the Round Table. The souls of those slayed by it can never enter Heaven, so they wander the world in endless agony.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks if a Mori is at the very end of allied reinforcements.

the-apocalypse.name: The Apocalypse
the-apocalypse.description: The end of the world shall begin with a single sound: the fall of a hammer, like a judge pronouncing a sentence.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if there is no Guardian among allies.

mt-penglai-s-prize.name: Mt. Penglai's Prize
mt-penglai-s-prize.description: They say that on Mount Penglai, the home of the immortals, there are trees with silver roots, gold trunks, and jeweled branches. When a certain princess demanded such a branch from one of her suitors, everyone dismissed it as a myth... But as it happens, if you believe in something sincerely enough, you may be granted a miracle.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have the Burn status effect.

kanesada.name: Kanesada
kanesada.description: Toshizo Hijikata's favorite blade. What elevated it above all others, even more than its exceptional sharpness, was its durability. Hijikata fought and fell, and the sword she held in her hand was still in excellent shape.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 5% bonus to attacks if this unit has stealth.

kiku-ichimonji.name: Kiku Ichimonji
kiku-ichimonji.description:
It is said this sword used to belong to the genius swordmaster Soji Okita, although whether the rumor is true or not is up for debate. Still, the very fact that it is widely considered to be worthy of the hand of a genius speaks for this blade's superiority.
It is also said that it once had a counterpart with a slightly different name...

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with active Sleep skills or Stealth Strike type active skills.

moonbeam-labrys.name: Moonbeam Labrys
moonbeam-labrys.description: There once was a desert queen who believed in the power of the moon. She'd bathe in the moonlight every night, and so would a certain diamond—until it turned into the blade of an axe known for eternal beauty and limitless strength.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or that have 50% or less of max HP.

invictus.name: Invictus
invictus.description: The symbols of a certain revolutionary leader's newly acquired imperial prerogatives included a crown, a set of jewels, and last but not least, this pistol—her most trusted battle companion.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if there is no Guardian among enemies.

oblivion-s-edge.name: Oblivion's Edge
oblivion-s-edge.description:
There once was a cowardly king who sought supernatural power in order to establish his authority—and so, he obtained this unearthly axe.
The king became a tyrant, executing countless people indiscriminately as he spiraled deeper and deeper into madness; and ultimately, the last head to fall to the axe was his own.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have a current TU of 50 or less.

peacemaker.name: Peacemaker
peacemaker.description: A weapon developed in distant future, after a century-long interstellar war. With its own nuclear power source, this blade was designed to eliminate not people or other weapons, but the concept of war itself.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if all enemies have 100+ TU.

cocytus.name: Cocytus
cocytus.description: One of the rivers flowing through the underworld, with a mighty demon sealed beneath its waters. As it endures endless torment and humiliation, it awaits a chance to exact its revenge—with this cursed spear in its hands.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the enemy has 1 or more sleeping units.

wrath-of-arges.name: Wrath of Arges
wrath-of-arges.description: A hammer capable of harnessing the power of lightning, originally made by Frankenstein for self-defense. Even though its destructive capabilities surpass those of an entire army, she abandoned it because it "wasn't pretty enough".

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 15% if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

scheherazade-wand.name: Scheherazade Wand
scheherazade-wand.description: A wand that once belonged to a great sorceress from a faraway Eastern land. They say she subdued a cruel tyrant with the power of her stories and thus freed her country from his reign.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 7% reduction to TU costs if there are at least 3 Light units on the battlefield.

aetherwing.name: Aetherwing
aetherwing.description: Imagine a world beyond the clouds—the realm of gods, or maybe winged mortal beings. Perhaps it is peaceful there, perhaps not... What we know is that one day, an axe capable of chopping up the sky itself fell down to Erden.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are Guardians.

sky-piercer.name: Sky Piercer
sky-piercer.description: The weapon Lü Bu used back in Zhonghua. No one has successfully wielded it since she left it behind—because this mighty spear is just as difficult to handle as it is powerful. If anyone can ever tame it again, they will have proven they are a warrior on par with Lü Bu herself.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 7% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

unsigned-kaneshige.name: Unsigned Kaneshige
unsigned-kaneshige.description: The sword Musashi used before she started fighting with two blades. Sharp enough to cut even the toughest oni down with a single stroke, according to a certain famous swordsmith, in the right hands it would easily slice a waterfall in two.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with active skills that can Stun or Burn Blast type active skills.

flame-of-hope.name: Flame of Hope
flame-of-hope.description: People have long entrusted their wishes to the flames of this torch. The more fervent the wish is, the brighter the fire burns. No matter how many times it goes out, the wishes remain, and soon a new flame rises to illuminate the wielder's path.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as 2 or more enemies are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield.

wingshears.name: Wingshears
wingshears.description: These winged blades speak on the behalf of their master's heart. Capable of cutting down enemies as easily as trimming hair, they are at their sharpest when slicing through a web of lies.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 50TU or less.

clarent.name: Clarent
clarent.description: A magnificent axe kept within King Arthur's vault. Even though it ended up being used by an insurgent, no matter how many wounds it dealt and how bloodied it became, its noble nature remained intact.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have 50% or less of max HP.

hex-vortex.name: Hex Vortex
hex-vortex.description: A weapon handed down from generation to generation in Percival's family. Having originally belonged to an afanc, a water monster capable of submerging an entire island in a devastating flood, it was believed to contain its demonic essence. However, once the first Percival took it in his hand, the evil was purged, leaving behind only enormous power.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

mallet-of-plenty.name: Mallet of Plenty
mallet-of-plenty.description: A ceremonial mallet created for the purpose of praying for good harvest. It wasn't originally meant to be a weapon; however, since its first owner was a deity who held dominion over both wealth and war, it is considered to have gained the power to exorcise evil.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

final-elegy.name: Final Elegy
final-elegy.description: Only one thing in this world is certain: nothing and no one can last forever. This weapon was forged with the express purpose of hunting down those who dare defy this unwritten law—the undead.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are at max HP.

bloody-rose.name: Bloody Rose
bloody-rose.description: Deep red roses signify passionate love, black roses—eternal love born once the passion has burned out and turned to soot. This blade was made to remove any obstacles people sharing such love may encounter.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks and 7% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

tideswayer.name: Tideswayer
tideswayer.description: Deep in an unexplored part of the ocean there is a flourishing civilization—fish who can talk like people and people who can live underwater like fish, all joined in peaceful coexistence. In the middle of their capital stands a towering structure, and in its innermost chamber slumbers a sacred staff—the one that reigns over the realm.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 7% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has survived for 150TU on the battlefield.

huntiegun.name: Huntiegun
huntiegun.description:
The Bull King, ruler of the Mountain of Flames, was one of Sun Wukong's most formidable enemies. This is the demonic hammer he wielded.
Some say that the king owed his power to raze mountains to the ground and the authority he had over hordes of demons to this very weapon. Now that the fires on the Mountain of Flames have long burned out, it rests sealed by a certain immortal.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

azure-rose.name: Azure Rose
azure-rose.description:
Blue roses used to be the symbol of the unattainable. But humans tend to be persistent when they want something, no matter how long it may take to obtain it.
It comes as no surprise that whoever takes this axe, named after a flower once deemed impossible, in their hand, will be given strength to cut through any difficulty and make their dreams come true.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or sleeping.

holy-rulemaker.name: Holy Rulemaker
holy-rulemaker.description:
This blade is no mere weapon.
Back when humankind was still but a part of the animal kingdom, before they could even speak, someone gave them a code to follow—the very first law by the very first monarch humanity knew. This sword, wielded by the monarch to ensure peace, can thus be considered the cornerstone of civilization.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks if this unit has the Burn status effect.

the-ageless.name: The Ageless
the-ageless.description:
Tradition dictates that great rulers should be buried in magnificent tombs, to sanctify them and thus make them eternal.
A certain weapon was given a regal burial too—an outstanding, all-too-powerful axe.
It has no epitaph to commemorate it, just eternity to share with the entombed monarchs.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

sacred-vow.name: Sacred Vow
sacred-vow.description: A beautiful staff tossed towards the sky during a festival held in a certain village. It is said that whoever catches it will find themselves a perfect match soon.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as an enemy unit is sleeping.

risanautr.name: Risanautr
risanautr.description: A god-slaying axe that once belonged to Rosó, a giant considered a legend among his folk. No one after him has been able to wield it—aside from a certain goddess of betrayal, that is.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned or sleeping.

gungnir.name: Gungnir
gungnir.description: A spear wielded by the supreme deity of a distant northern land. Once thrown, it will hit and slay its target without fail, and come right back to its master's hand.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

moon-mallet.name: Moon Mallet
moon-mallet.description:
Thump, thump, thump—
The moon rabbits pound rice with this mallet to make mochi cakes full of dreams. They'll be sent down to the world on the next full-moon night—the gentlest shooting stars the universe has to offer.
They have no taste and won't fill your stomach, but if you catch one, it will grant you one wish.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as 2 or more allies have Stealth.

divine-mirror.name: Divine Mirror
divine-mirror.description:
A mirror sent from a distant land as a gift for the Queen.
They say the design on its back represents the immortals—humans in their ideal form. If so, will its front reflect your ideal self as well?

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

parasoul.name: Parasoul
parasoul.description: A vibrant spear found stuck into the sand by the sea. It promises an unforgettable summer to anyone who lays their eyes on it.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

chainsword.name: Chainsword
chainsword.description:
It appeared on Friday the 13th in a gloomy forest, letting out a vicious growl.
Not a weapon of a cold-blooded murderer, not a tool of a mysterious stranger—this blade is human fear manifested.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 2+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

caliburn.name: Caliburn
caliburn.description:
A sword only the true king can wield—for it is the sword that chooses the king, not the other way around.
And the one who wields this sword can do no wrong...

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

holy-arondight.name: Holy Arondight
holy-arondight.description: Just like Lancelot has redeemed the ill-famed name she had inherited, so have her twin swords found new concepts to symbolize—love and fidelity.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

heart-prism.name: Heart Prism
heart-prism.description: An adorable wand wielded by an equally adorable and powerful magical girl. It contains love so strong it borders on madness.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs as long as there is no Guardian among allies.

angel-of-greed.name: Angel of Greed
angel-of-greed.description:
The urban legend goes, every swing of this axe gets you a huge donation.
It hoards the blood and the madness of every online streamer who's ever pursued it.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units that have been in battle for 200+ TU or have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

sosan-samonji.name: Sosan Samonji
sosan-samonji.description: One of the numerous swords in Nobunaga's collection, and one she is particularly fond of. The more blood it devours, the brighter the unholy flames that engulf it burn.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Time Strike or Dream Hunter type active skills.

icebound-vow.name: Icebound Vow
icebound-vow.description:
A holy spear formed from red roses fused with everlasting snow. In the language of flowers the roses signify love and passion, and if the wielder of the spear has these undying feelings in their heart, they will be granted immeasurable power.
Particularly effective against adulterers.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

dragonheart.name: Dragonheart
dragonheart.description: A heroic Red Dragon Knight's beloved weapon. Those who wield it inherit the passionate spirit of its original owner.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as an enemy unit is sleeping.

chronotheristes.name: Chronotheristes
chronotheristes.description: A blade used to prune the time that has passed. Only the priestesses of the Temple of Time are allowed to use it.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Burn Blast or Dream Hunter type active skills.

windchaser.name: Windchaser
windchaser.description: A mechanical axe created from motorcycle parts. The suspension and the cylinder reduce the strain on the user, and revving the engine amplifies the weapon's destructive power.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have been in battle for less than 200TU.

briar-rose.name: Briar Rose
briar-rose.description: A sword resting in a castle overgrown with thorny vines. Within it dwells a lonely girl's fervent wish.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more enemies are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield.

cendrillon.name: Cendrillon
cendrillon.description: A sword wielded by a princess known for relying on her own strength and convictions to cut her own path in life.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the enemy team's Spirit is at 2 or less.

shooting-star.name: Shooting Star
shooting-star.description: A sword forged from meteorite iron. Though without a legend of its own, it is a supreme blade that will never break or go dull. They say that its wielder, the man who once led the Red Dragon Knights, did not get a chance to pass it down to his beloved daughter directly.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks if this unit has the Burn status effect.

55-1-assault-rod.name: O55-1A Assault Rod
55-1-assault-rod.description:
One has to wonder: if the scientist's creation hadn't assumed human shape, if it hadn't appeared to have feelings—
maybe then she wouldn't have worried so much about its future in her last moments.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

drachenkeule.name: Drachenkeule
drachenkeule.description: A mace modeled after the tail of an evil dragon, said to have fallen from the sky centuries ago. Constantly veiled in ominous glow, it fills its wielder with destructive power and violent hatred.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if the enemy has 2 or more units left than allies.

shub-niggurath.name: Shub-Niggurath
shub-niggurath.description: A mace bearing the name of a monstrous deity and all the madness of its worshippers, determined to uphold their beliefs in the face of rejection and contempt.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit's HP is at 90%+.

caduceus.name: Caduceus
caduceus.description: A staff used by the god of good fortune and cunning. Those who wield it gain enormous hypnotizing power, capable of bewitching entire countries.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

full-throttle.name: Full Throttle
full-throttle.description: A hammer harboring the soul of a legendary racer. The wheels mounted on its head never stop spinning, and can tear any opponent to shreds.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

passaddhi.name: Passaddhi
passaddhi.description: A famed emerald axe made from a mythical beast's antler. Its breathtaking beauty hides unexpectedly wild power.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are at max HP.

tyrfing.name: Tyrfing
tyrfing.description:
A sword that knows no substance too hard to cut, never rusts, and never fails to bring death to its target—but that is not its true nature.
Once this cursed blade is drawn, it cares not for its wielder's intentions, and will not be put down until it has made a kill.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if there is no Guardian among allies.

arondight.name: Arondight
arondight.description: Twin swords wielded by the current Lancelot. Originally a single blade, Arondight was split into two when its first master betrayed his comrades; one half bears his crime, the other—his punishment.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

divine-macuahuitl.name: Divine Macuahuitl
divine-macuahuitl.description: A club that has once belonged to a god of nature worshipped by a mysterious ancient civilization. The green stone that makes up its core holds the god's power, bending the untamed nature—the wind, the flora, the land itself—to its wielder's will.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

demonrage.name: Demonrage
demonrage.description: A mace told in the West to have once belonged to a ferocious and brutal demon of fire. Whoever wields it gets seized with an unbounded fury, and doomed to deal fiery death until they burn out themselves.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

queen-of-hearts.name: Queen of Hearts
queen-of-hearts.description: A mace wielded by a cruel monarch of a wondrous world of dreams. The targets of its magic turn into playing cards, hedgehogs or flamingos and become the Queen's lifetime playmates.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit's current TU is 50 or less.

ruyi-bang.name: Ruyi Bang
ruyi-bang.description: Unrestrained, unlimited staff Ruyi Bang, formerly known as Ruyi Jingu Bang. It can easily extend higher than people, buildings, higher even than mountains. Whether it stretches to the core of the Earth or to the skies above clouds, the view it takes in is one and the same.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

stormbringer.name: Stormbringer
stormbringer.description: Why is that in every mythology there is a god who commands thunder? Does it mean that in fact they are all one god? If that is true, then it is also true that this thunderbolt staff, said to have once belonged to the supreme deity of a certain pantheon, can turn anything and everything to ashes.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

shichishito.name: Shichishito
shichishito.description: The aptly named Seven-Branched Sword, with six prongs along the central blade. The sacred weapon enshrined in a god's treasury. The mystery of the inscription on the side of its blade is yet to be solved, but perhaps it speaks of destroying injustice and upholding righteousness.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Dream Hunter type active skills.

axe-of-zhuque.name: Axe of Zhuque
axe-of-zhuque.description: A divine axe blazing with eternal hellfire—the sacred flame that warms the righteous and turns the wicked to ashes.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have 50% or less of max HP.

hades-s-bident.name: Hades's Bident
hades-s-bident.description: A two-pronged spear that once belonged to the King of the Underworld. It can harvest hopes and pass judgment on souls with just one stab.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

great-mage-s-staff.name: Great Mage's Staff
great-mage-s-staff.description: A staff once used by a legendary sorcerer, rumored to be the greatest one ever. Fastidious in nature, it turns into an ordinary stick when held by those it deems undeserving, and becomes the finest magical tool in the hands of those who are worthy.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

axe-of-baihu.name: Axe of Baihu
axe-of-baihu.description: An axe holding the power of the White Tiger—the guardian beast of the West. Its fang-like blade, hard enough to crush even diamonds, shines beautifully yet coldly, just like the stars.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with a Revenge passive skill.

frostbite.name: Frostbite
frostbite.description: A first-rate sword, glowing softly like the winter moon. Its azure blade can freeze the very air around it, and turn even the hottest dragonfire into frost flowers with a single swing.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Poison Eater or Blood Shot type active skills.

spear-of-qinglong.name: Spear of Qinglong
spear-of-qinglong.description: On a festival night, when the sky lit up with countless paper lanterns, a little girl's eyes were drawn to a hazy crescent moon reflected in the water— glowing with sacred, azure light, a blessing from the dragon guardian of the East.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield.

rod-of-xuanwu.name: Rod of Xuanwu
rod-of-xuanwu.description: Neither the ever-burning flames nor the freezing wind capable of vanquishing them can ever even scratch the rod in which the valiant Xuanwu's power dwells.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy has 1 or more characters left than allies.

kogarasumaru.name: Kogarasumaru
kogarasumaru.description: A legendary sword rumored to have been dropped into this world by Yatagarasu, the raven messenger of the gods. Anyone who comes into contact with the sickly blue aura surrounding its blade will be afflicted with an unbreakable curse.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Stealth Strike or Time Strike type active skills.

flamberge.name: Flamberge
flamberge.description: A legendary sword once wielded by a Holy Knight. They say those enchanted by the beauty of its wavelike blade all meet a swift end.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if the enemy has 2 or more units left than allies.

doujigiri.name: Doujigiri
doujigiri.description: Be it human or demonic, no life can escape this merciless blade. Think well before you strike—for a blade only goes where you point it.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with active Sleep skills.

hrunting.name: Hrunting
hrunting.description: A legendary cursed sword, rumored to grow stronger every time it quenches its thirst with blood. Those who dare wield it gain unparalleled power. However, the price is being forever haunted by the screams of its countless victims.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

caladbolg.name: Caladbolg
caladbolg.description: The sword of a legendary hero, once believed to be a hardened lightning bolt. They say it could change its length according to its wielder's will, and that it once cut the tops of three hills clean off in one swing.

localization.name: Might Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

leviathan.name: Leviathan
leviathan.description: A distant warship disappears swallowed by raging waves, its crew caught off guard by the sudden storm. Little do they know, the godlike power that brought them such a fate dwells within a faint blue light resting in the depths of the sea.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against sleeping units.

vanargand.name: Vanargand
vanargand.description:
They spoke of a beast that took the form of a giant wolf. They spoke of a beast that could bring disaster upon the gods themselves. They spoke of a beasts whose fang, once used to devour the king of the gods, has become a blade.
They spoke of a blade awaiting the day it will devour gods again.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

hanuman-s-mace.name: Hanuman's Mace
hanuman-s-mace.description: A mace once wielded by a god in the form of a monkey. It can freely change its form and properties, becoming as light as thread or as heavy as a glacier. A weapon as capricious as its master.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

yggdrasil.name: Yggdrasil
yggdrasil.description: A staff made from a branch of the grand World Tree, the ash that entwines all worlds. Its power allows all that is to be remade, and can even create form from nothingness. It can create, or destroy, a world with a thought.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as the enemy party has 1 or more units left than allies.

onimaru.name: Onimaru
onimaru.description: An exorcist's blade used to seal away an ancient and evil spirit. The sword, and the evil within it, lay dormant for a thousand years. But in the 1001st year, it awoke, and smashed through its own seal. Onimaru, once a weapon against the defiled forces of darkness, arose as its own twisted reflection.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with active skills that can Stun or grant the Sleep status effect.

yata-staff.name: Yata Staff
yata-staff.description: A portion of the Sun Goddess's divine being, hidden in a small snow-covered shrine. One swing brings spring to the land; another purifies it wholly. If the staff's owner is worthy, a third swing is permitted, to bring down the Sun Herself to heal all the world's ills.

localization.name: Finesse Up
localization.description: 6% reduction to TU costs and reduces damage from enemy attacks by 6% as long as there is no Guardian among allies.

starshatter-blade.name: Starshatter Blade
starshatter-blade.description:
The blade that transcends space.
Every time it leaves a planet, it is reforged and born anew.
This blade, which has drunk deep of histories, techniques, and desires as countless as the stars, will appear before the one who needs it most—
Falling from the heavens like a blazing star.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Blood Shot type active skills.

dark-remnant.name: Dark Remnant
dark-remnant.description: A mage was cursed with power enough to bring the world to ruin. Fearing the power, he locked himself away. Years, then decades passed; and even after his death, his staff still burns with those wicked flames— and the madness of a hundred years in isolation.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

areadbhar.name: Areadbhar
areadbhar.description: A spear of light capable of reducing all in its path to ash. Its mere presence is enough to set an entire city ablaze.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

axe-of-pangu.name: Axe of Pangu
axe-of-pangu.description: In ancient times, the world was chaos, formless and undifferentiated, until a god struck the mighty blow that separated the heavens from the earth. The axe that split the world has rested in a divine crag for countless ages, waiting for its master's return.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned.

excalibur.name: Excalibur
excalibur.description: According to the ancient legend, the one who wields this sword gains power and dominion over the world. Many battles have been fought and countless lives lost in the names of those who believed themselves worthy to claim it.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

kusanagi.name: Kusanagi
kusanagi.description: A divine relic said to have existed since the dawn of time. This blade, which embodies the concept of power, has been the seed of thousands of conflicts across history. The one who holds it at the end of each conflict is no king or warrior-lord, but a blood-soaked youth with hollow eyes.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with active skills that can Stun or Time Strike type active skills.

heracles-s-warclub.name: Heracles's Warclub
heracles-s-warclub.description: The weapon of an ancient hero who overcame twelve impossible trials to become a god. The blood of the lion, and its hatred, still burn within this warclub.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as an enemy unit is sleeping.

bunyan-s-axe.name: Bunyan's Axe
bunyan-s-axe.description: The axe was lonely. It was far too big for any normal human to swing. Around the time it was starting to forget whether it was an axe at all, or just a hunk of wood and metal, a big, big man came along and hefted it up onto his shoulder. The time had come to start building the world.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with a Revenge passive skill.

sharur.name: Sharur
sharur.description:
Split the seas, split the earth, and speak.
Spit poison, spit fire, and speak.
"Stick with me, and we'll conquer the world."
A weapon with no equal, and surprisingly fun to talk to, as well.
"If you stay on my good side, I'll tell you all your enemies' weaknesses."

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit's HP is at 90%+.

royal-scepter.name: Royal Scepter
royal-scepter.description: A magic staff once used by the kind Queen of a snowy kingdom, now wielded by her daughter. Only the pure of heart may touch it.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

van-helsing.name: Van Helsing
van-helsing.description: Red Riding Hood's beloved axe. It's heavy enough that even a brawny man might struggle to wield it.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have a current TU of 150 or more.

poseidon-s-fork.name: Poseidon's Fork
poseidon-s-fork.description: An ancient divine weapon, long left slumbering far below the waves. A single swing tears the seas and heavens asunder.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

uchide-no-kozuchi.name: Uchide no Kozuchi
uchide-no-kozuchi.description: A legendary treasure said to rest somewhere in Kisenkyo. A single swing is said to fill the bearer's pockets with gold.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as 2 or more allies have Stealth.

despinox.name: Despinox
despinox.description:
The ancient kingdom of Klaster suffered a century of mad kings, but only ever knew a single executioner. Year after year he remained, through war and revolution, famine and plague, taking the heads of his master's enemies.

They say his true soul lived in his axe, feasting on the lives it ended.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are poisoned.

mjolnir.name: Mjolnir
mjolnir.description:
Before the Bergarian Emperor rose to power, tribal warlords vied for control of the Northland continent. The most legendary was a man called Sven Stormlord, who led a fleet of ships so fearsome the northern ice split before them.

At the height of his conquest, the Primordial of Storms chose him as his Avatar and gifted him a hammer worthy of a god. They say Sven never died but sails through the heavens still, battering Erden's enemies with the fury of thunder.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit's current TU is 50 or less.

arclight-buster.name: Arclight Buster
arclight-buster.description:
"The warrior knows his sword is no symbol of peace. The weak he encounters will shrink away at the very sight of it; the strong will see that he wields it and challenge him to battle. Why, then, do swords exist? 

Because although a sword will never bring peace, it may yet bring justice." 

-- Writings of Avonia, Vessel of the Goddess's Wisdom, slain in the Third Requiem

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

pink-sugar.name: Pink Sugar
pink-sugar.description:
The idol's voice was so sweet, and so unimaginably strong, that the tabloids insisted her signature microphone was enchanted. Surely anyone who held it could sound as marvelous as she did. 

When she heard this, the idol invited her accusers onstage at her next concert and challenged them to sing into her 'magical' mic stand. 

The rumor died that very night.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at least 99% of max.

longinus.name: Longinus
longinus.description:
Not every Pandemonium has ended happily.

When a Crimson Crestbearer, drunk on power, marched across the land as its conqueror, his partner Cerulean faced a torturous choice. Would he kill the chosen one and condemn the world to a century of Pandemonium, or allow him to forge his empire of blood in exchange for slaying the Eternal?

In the end, he stabbed his former friend in the back, stopping him from taking Rigland's capital at an unfathomable cost. Their battlefield lies fallow to this day.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

mistelzweig.name: Mistelzweig
mistelzweig.description: A noble title in Rigland comes with certain responsibilities. First, you must protect the lives of your people; second, their wellbeing; and third, their happiness. The hammer Mistelzweig, legendary weapon of Rigland's northernmost lord, takes care of those first two duties. His feasts ensure the last is never forgotten.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

senketsu.name: Senketsu
senketsu.description:
"The vampire lords of Erden are not confined to Westland's shores. Even to the east, these creatures of the night vie for power, stalk their prey, and hide among the honorable and good.

Some say even the ranks of the samurai are tainted."

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Stealth Strike type active skills.

suzaku-no-tachi.name: Suzaku no Tachi
suzaku-no-tachi.description:
"To the south rose a warlord, a force like a forest fire, devastating all in his path.

He claimed to be the Vermillion Bird made flesh, a god destined to forge the land anew.

But people are not made of steel; they cannot be tempered in flames. When the might of the emperor descended on him at last, he held only a fortress of smoke and ashes."

-- from The Imperial Histories of Eastland, author unknown"

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with active skills that can Stun.

tsukuyomi.name: Tsukuyomi
tsukuyomi.description:
"Eastland, home of the bikki, has not suffered an invasion for over a thousand years. An order of samurai, their souls purified by the light of the moon, fight tirelessly to protect their kingdom's shores, pushing back all who would claim it.

No one knows how this order began, or how its members are chosen. Only the samurai know, and they do not speak a word of it to anyone."

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks against units with Poison Eater or Vengeance Strike type active skills.

velantha.name: Velantha
velantha.description: A goddess guards the forests of the elves. None know her name, for it can only be spoken in the ancient tongue, but the name of her spear survives. Velantha: the sunlight which pierces even the thickest canopy.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

fleur-fatale.name: Fleur Fatale
fleur-fatale.description:
All the peoples of Erden have their stories warning against the stranger with pretty words, the temptress with promises too good to be true.

What a shame how few remember them when the time comes.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield.

driftsteel-spear.name: Driftsteel Spear
driftsteel-spear.description: Legend tells of an island kingdom long lost to the ocean's wrath. Though few records of its people or history exist, every so often a weapon of unmatched craftsmanship will wash ashore, an echo of those who sleep beneath the waves.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

lilium-sanguis.name: Lilium Sanguis
lilium-sanguis.description:
"Codename: ATR-0X1
Classification: Lilium Sanguis

Specimen continues to exceed expectations. Its petals, stamen, and stem have hardened to a durable texture resembling iron, and it appears to emit an odor both toxic and caustic to all who inhale.

I feel it is now ready to graduate from a diet of blood to live prey. Father will be most pleased."

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as allies have 2 or less Spirit.

murakumo.name: Murakumo
murakumo.description:
I still remember the look on my mother's face when she gave me this sword.
"We of the branch family are shadows. The gathering clouds that sweep across the moon that is the royal family."
She apologized that she couldn't raise me in the main family, and looked away.

I wanted to tell her it didn't matter, so long as I could protect Sanga. But the words died on my lips.

Even so, without this blade, I would never have met my Master. Fate, it seems, is a fickle thing.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Over Drive type active skills.

bloodbane.name: Bloodbane
bloodbane.description:
Every weapon carries the lives of those it has slain. Blades across Erden, rusted and gleaming, hide histories of untold death. Even so, none can match the cruelty of the axe forged in hellfire.

With every swing, it echoes with the cries of the damned. The souls of its victims rest not in the afterlife, but within the axe's cold iron, damned to bathe in blood for all eternity.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have been in battle for 200TU or more.

spear-of-silence.name: Spear of Silence
spear-of-silence.description:
Many of Erden's smiths enchant their wares with magic. Only a hidden order of mages employs the forbidden art of soulforging, passed down in whispers from times of old. This spear, one of their earliest creations, brought its wielders unmatched glory.

Yet mysteriously, each of them met with a grizzly and untimely demise.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 15% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

athanor.name: Athanor
athanor.description:
Should you wish to forge this hammer of pure destruction:

First, melt the blade of a fallen soldier and inscribe with its iron a circle. Within it, place an offering of gold equal to all that you own. Shed upon this the blood of your beloved--how you obtain it matters not.

From these three ingredients, the same demanded by war, shall your victory rise.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

aldorean.name: Aldorean
aldorean.description: Even in their heavy weapons, the elves prize speed above all. The greatsword Aldorean, revered as a marvel among elven blades, strikes with the might of a two-handed blade, but cuts through the air as swiftly as a thief's dagger.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

seastrider.name: Seastrider
seastrider.description:
A pirate's ship is his home, his love, his truest companion. When the captain's sloop sailed her final voyage, too old and weathered to go on, he didn't sell her for scrap. He set fire to her sails and let her loose at sea, her only fitting grave. Still, he couldn't bear to part with her completely.

He had her anchor forged into a hammer, so he could carry her with him to the ends of Erden.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit's current TU is 150 or more.

ma-at.name: Ma'at
ma-at.description: Having conquered the southern continent, Ga'Khila, greatest of the ancient sziviik Ga's, grew restless once more. He turned his eyes to the raging sea keeping Westland out of reach. His advisers pleaded with him to stay and rule over his young kingdom, but the fire in his veins spurred him on. Few know how he managed to cross those treacherous waters. Legend has it he commanded the desert sun with his axe, cutting a dry path for his army stroke by stroke.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are Guardians.

yaotl.name: Yaotl
yaotl.description: In ages past, the Primordial of Battle walked among the peoples of Erden. His followers built him a temple of gold, melting down the spoils of those they conquered, until their city blazed like the morning sun. To this day, no one knows how such a prosperous kingdom fell. Only its treasures remain, ancient memories of war and glory.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with the Hold Ground passive skill.

hymelian-thunder.name: Hymelian Thunder
hymelian-thunder.description: The royals of Hymelia spare no expense when it comes to protection. They select only the finest recruits for their bodyguards, and outfit them with greataxes fit to split the earth.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against sleeping units.

armageddon.name: Armageddon
armageddon.description: This weapon sleeps at the end of all things. The hatred and rage of those who stood, futilely, against the immortal Dragon, infuses its being, and it longs for the day it will be used.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against the enemy Leader.

heaven-s-gleam.name: Heaven's Gleam
heaven-s-gleam.description:
When the hordes came, the holy warrior thought all her hope lost. Her soldiers slain, her weapon shattered, she raised her hand skyward to beg her god for one more chance. One more battle.

A winged spear formed from the sunlight streaming through her fingers, and with this miraculous gift in hand, she cut down every monster in her path.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

eye-of-orum.name: Eye of Orum
eye-of-orum.description: In Erden, some believe light magic can never be used for evil. But one need only look to Orum, the legendary sorcerer responsible for scorching the Habsu forests, to know that they are wrong.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 15% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

horologia.name: Horologia
horologia.description:
The great Primordial Chronos gifts few with her power over time. The temptation to misuse it—to erase mistakes or to freeze oneself in a moment of happiness—is too much for many to bear. A weak person, with such magic in their hands, could twist the flow of history into something unrecognizable.

It is fortunate, then, that the wielder of Chronos's most powerful staff is anything but weak.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

masamune.name: Masamune
masamune.description:
The swordsmith Masamune once set out to craft a blade to rival the gods' own glory. Night and day he labored, without sleep, without a moment's pause, until the steel in his hands could shear stone in two.

When he finished, it is said he wept, for how could such a work of art be doomed to drown in blood?

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Time Strike type active skills.

zenith.name: Zenith
zenith.description:
His teachers scolded him for his bizarre experiments. His classmates snickered at his rickety inventions, contraptions of gears and glass that exploded more often than they functioned. Even in university, his dream of mana-powered machinery got him laughed out of the lecture hall.

But this hammer, bearing within it the voidborn magic of a dragon lord, has proven the ambitious young inventor was never a fool.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy has 1 or more characters left than allies.

sancta-paladia.name: Sancta Paladia
sancta-paladia.description: Those who serve the Primordial of Justice arm themselves with sacred spears. Though the corrupt and undead crumble before them, their blades will never harm a righteous soul.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

scarlet-thorn.name: Scarlet Thorn
scarlet-thorn.description: In the distant past, a noble family of Rigland commissioned this sword for their daughter, who was renowned both for her beauty and her strength. Every generation since, her descendants have dueled for the right to claim her blade and carry on her legacy.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 1 or more allies are at 150TU or more.

liberator.name: Liberator
liberator.description:
Shortly after she founded her rebellion, Rizette melted down her sword and forged it anew. Its appearance has changed and its worth has been tested, much like the Knights themselves, but its essence remains unbroken.

Cerulean as the vault of heaven, this blade has saved Erden once. It will do so again.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if the enemy has 2 or less Spirit.

thieves-fortune.name: Thieves' Fortune
thieves-fortune.description:
Hymelia's King of Thieves made his name parting nobles from their riches. With their silver and gold, he forged himself a mace and dared any challenger to take it from him.

Cyrus stole it without batting an eye, but turned down the title it brought him. After all, no thief with any dignity would call himself a king.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as the enemy will have 2 or less Spirit after their attack.

dragonfury.name: Dragonfury
dragonfury.description:
An heirloom of the von Draclow family, the greatsword Dragonfury has been passed down for generations without rusting or going dull. As inexhaustible as Astrid's will to fight, enemies both living and undead have fallen to its deadly edge. The very act of battle seems to keep it keen.

Learning to wield it from her father is the one memory of him Astrid looks upon with fondness.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

tsukikage.name: Tsukikage
tsukikage.description: The bikki of ancient Eastland relied on a sage to ward away evil from their shores. Channeling the moonlight through her sacred naginata, she fulfilled her duty with pride.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

muramasa.name: Muramasa
muramasa.description:
Many hundreds of years ago, a young warlord sought out an oni for aid. He offered it his blade for a home, and the blood of his enemies for sustenance. The oni ate well, but its hunger was greater than the warlord could have ever known.

When he died on his feet in battle, some said his heart gave out. Others whispered that the oni finally consumed his soul.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Stealth Strike type active skills.

winter-s-kiss.name: Winter's Kiss
winter-s-kiss.description:
The Winter Witch forged this staff to channel her powers without an open sky. All who saw it trembled, for travelers told tales of deserts frozen and palaces shattered like ice.

Like the Witch herself, it has been missing for many years.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

fortunatus.name: Fortunatus
fortunatus.description:
An explorer found this weapon stowed in the corner of a cavernous tomb. He scoured the rest of the magnificent chamber, but found nothing. Centuries of looters had already stripped it clean.

Just who was buried there, that an axe of solid emerald and gold counted least among his treasures?

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with the Hold Ground passive skill.

dunedancer.name: Dunedancer
dunedancer.description: At the height of their notoriety, the dunedancers of the Habsu crafted blades imbued with immobilizing magic. As the legend goes, they left their victims alive but paralyzed, prisoners in their own bodies.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit has survived for 250TU on the battlefield.

yan-long-dao.name: Yan Long Dao
yan-long-dao.description: Crafted under the eye of a scarlet dragon, this blade is said to grant a thousand wishes. But take care. Not all dreams were meant to see the morning.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

spearmint.name: Spearmint
spearmint.description:
Christmas is a time of self-reflection. Nice or naughty, the people of Erden look back on the year they had and resolve to be a better person.

Well...most do.

Others need a little encouragement.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 15% reduction to TU costs if the equipped unit's HP is at 50% or less.

depthforged.name: Depthforged
depthforged.description:
An ancient warhammer passed down for generations by a clan of seafaring raiders. Some say their first chieftain pulled it from the ocean depths. Some say it was forged as an offering to the great dragon Kaidaros, and that is why it possesses its power over the sea.

All know its strikes echo like thunder, and any captain who sees it knows his ship is doomed.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as allies have 7 or more Spirit.

aquiline-saber.name: Aquiline Saber
aquiline-saber.description:
There once was a hero by the name of Aymr Vanholm, known as the Eagle Knight.
He was blessed by the spirits of the winds themselves, and his swordsmanship was so fast and elegant that those who saw him thought him divine.
He defeated many fearsome beasts and demons, each victory another page in his heroic legend, and he became known as one of the greatest knights in history - the Blades of Erden.
Even after his death, the equipment he used in life retained the powerful blessings of the wind spirits. This sword is one such relic; lighter, faster, and sharper than any ordinary blade, it waits for its own legend to continue.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

stormcleaver.name: Stormcleaver
stormcleaver.description: An ancient people followed the Dragon of Storms across the face of Erden. Using the scales and talons he cast off, they created a mighty axe, and then magically captured and bound a bolt of lightning within it. In the hands of a master, a single swing can burn down a forest. All others who touch the blade will themselves be shocked.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have a current TU of 150 or more.

deathbreaker.name: Deathbreaker
deathbreaker.description: It is whispered that the goddess Orcanix tore this sword from her heart to unleash her terrible mercy upon the world. The blade's flaming aura bids its victims rise. Then, it bids them follow.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

star-of-aldyne.name: Star of Aldyne
star-of-aldyne.description:
A storied heirloom mace belonging to House Aldyne, and featured in most of their greatest tales of heroism and bravery.
When Ludmilla ran away from home to join the Red Dragon Knights, she brought the Star with her.
Her parents were furious, but the ancient heroes of the Aldyne bloodline are no doubt proud to see it wielded by such a worthy warrior.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

nameless.name: Nameless
nameless.description:
A weapon found by Kisara on the battlefield, given to Norza as his first blade.
By the ornamentation, it was likely a noble's blade; but the owner's identity, and the sword's original name, are lost to time.
When he first received it, Norza was almost shorter than the blade was long; but through his years of hard training, he learned to master it.
This blade serves as a memento of Norza's past life. The moment he let it go was the moment he fell to darkness, and the moment of his final parting with his Master.

localization.name: Offense Up
localization.description: 7% bonus to attacks and 6% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more enemies have 100+ TU.

pride-of-roa.name: Pride of Roa
pride-of-roa.description:
