A masterwork blade made by Urg Roa's finest smith, Gilgan, for its finest swordsman, his younger brother Druke. This blade ended countless demons' lives.
The older brother forged steel; the younger wielded it. They believed those days would last forever.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if allies will have 2 or less Spirit left after this unit attacks.

nacre-staff.name: Nacre Staff
nacre-staff.description: The handle of this staff is coated in the nacre of magical clams that inhabit the deepest parts of the ocean. It is cold yet pleasant to the touch, and its metallic sheen seems to glow with a light of its own.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

lunar-monarch.name: Lunar Monarch
lunar-monarch.description: This staff is a symbol of dominion over one of Erden's moons. There's no way for you to actually go there, and even if you could, it's an empty kingdom with nothing for you to rule over. But there is a certain satisfaction in seeing that moon in the sky, and knowing it all belongs to you.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 1 or more allies are at 150TU or more.

bitten-blade.name: Bitten Blade
bitten-blade.description: According to legend, one day a brave young warrior found a strange beast unlike anything she has seen before. Heavily injured, the beast offered the hero a blade with a peculiar shape in exchange for its life. Able to talk, the beast described how the blade belonged to a great warrior that it had fought in a deadly duel, and the two holes near its handle were from the beast's own teeth. Just as the beast could bite through metal, the edge of this blade could cut through the beast's otherwise impenetrable hide.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Time Strike type active skills.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if allies will have 2 or less Spirit left after this unit attacks.

skygem-axe.name: Skygem Axe
skygem-axe.description: Crafted from a rare blue crystal, this axe appears as if it was made from the sky itself. It is said that the impact of this weapon will split apart any overcast above, revealing the azure beyond.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

night-s-end.name: Night's End
night-s-end.description:
This gleaming weapon hides its true nature away, much like its wielder. At first glance, it appears to be a simple -- if magnificent -- spear. Only those once lost in darkness can see the guiding light within.

And only one with a radiant heart can command that light to shine forth.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 2 or more allies have Stealth.

yanagi-blade.name: Yanagi Blade
yanagi-blade.description: A giant knife specially made to filet the giant fish native to the waters near Laomis. Top-grade sashimi demands the freshest preparation possible; and so this blade possesses a wickedly sharp razor edge.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills.

whalesbreath.name: Whalesbreath
whalesbreath.description: A sword carved from the backbone of a beached whale. If drawn near a body of saltwater, the blade exudes a thick, chilling mist - which some say is the soul of the whale, yearning to return to the depths.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if allies will have 2 or less Spirit left after this unit attacks.

fierte.name: Fierte
fierte.description: This spear bears no ornamentation to draw the eye. It wasn't forged from dragonbone or star iron, and no legendary smith shaped it. But ornamentation weighs a wielder down, and talk of legends breeds dependence, or overconfidence. This is a spear stripped down to its most essential form: a weapon meant for killing, which it does very, very well.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

kohiwi.name: Kohiwi
kohiwi.description: Somewhere in a hidden corner of the world stands a proud and ancient guardian tree, whose boughs shade and shelter a forest bursting with life. This weapon is carved from a branch of the tree, and carries its mystic blessing.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as 2 or more allies have Stealth.

adamant-axe.name: Adamant Axe
adamant-axe.description: An axe wielded by a brave warrior who journied alongside a hero of old. The blade is said to have sliced the sky overhead, split the earth underfoot, and carved a path for the hero through all that would stand in the way.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that are Guardians.

termagant.name: Termagant
termagant.description: A sword once worshiped by a fell cult. The dark jewel in the hilt is polished to a mirrorlike shine, and it's said that those who see themselves reflected in its surface are immediately turned to stone.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

ridill.name: Ridill
ridill.description: A legendary blade ripped from the gullet of an ancient dragon by a knight who fought against the machinations of Fate. The saga of the knight is known across Erden, though with many regional differences. Everyone agrees, though, that the knight was a hero who fought to save the world, and the tale is popular among everyone from smallfolk to royal families.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if 1 or more allies are at 150TU or more.

scaleshatter.name: Scaleshatter
scaleshatter.description: Great maces are rarely seen among the szi, but their wielders are among the most feared of all the Ga. The strength it takes to wield this monster of a weapon demands respect, as a solid hit can crush shield, scale, flesh, and bone all at once.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

brutalizer.name: Brutalizer
brutalizer.description: The cruel design of this weapon, and the wicked sharpness of its blades, tell a chilling tale of the purpose it was forged for: not to kill immediately, but to inflict hideously painful wounds.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 1 or more allies are at 150TU or more.

gaia-lamp.name: Gaia Lamp
gaia-lamp.description: This staff was designed by a legendary insectomancer, a sorceress who performs magic through insects. The lantern is always surrounded with butterflies.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the enemy has 2 or more poisoned units.

phoenix-wand.name: Phoenix Wand
phoenix-wand.description: The wing-like decorations on this wand are made from the feathers of an ancient phoenix, and still burn with everlasting flame.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

dragonfang.name: Dragonfang
dragonfang.description: This blade, a symbol of the Red Dragon Knights' power and authority, has been wielded by generations of legendary knights. Each new Commander is expected to grow into a leader worthy of its majesty, and lead with wisdom and grace.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if there are 4 or more units with the Burn status effect.

storm-staff.name: Storm Staff
storm-staff.description: The creator of this staff used potent magics to capture a devastating typhoon. She intended to save a village, and she did. But she also made a weapon.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the enemy party has 1 or more units left than allies.

al-feras.name: Al Feras
al-feras.description: A legendary staff blessed by Rei, the sage of Kisenkyo. It radiates a gentle, tranquil warmth, but great power sleeps within.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if the enemy has 1 or more sleeping units.

nagi-ichimonji.name: Nagi Ichimonji
nagi-ichimonji.description: The unusual curved blades used by bikki warriors hold a special place in their society. It it believed that each samurai's blade reflects their soul—so it's little wonder that Nagi's blade shines fierce, bright and true, and strikes down evil wherever it may hide.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Poison Eater type active skills.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 25% bonus to attacks if allies have 2 or more units left than the enemy.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 25% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 20% reduction to TU costs if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 20% reduction to TU costs if the enemy has 1 or more sleeping units.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 15% but this unit's skills will cost 50% more TU.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 15% but this unit's skills will cost 50% more TU.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 25% bonus to attacks against units with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 25% bonus to attacks against units that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 20% bonus to attacks against units that have been in battle for 200TU or more.

mace-of-avarci.name: Mace of Avarci
mace-of-avarci.description: This mace was named for the ruin from which it was recovered. Many have speculated that it is a relic of a dwarven colony, though the existence of dwarves in Westland is still heavily debated. The patterns engraved into the shaft are believed to be a family emblem.

localization.name: Stun Resist
localization.description: Reduces the amount of any stun effects against the equipped unit by 30TU.

cloudbreaker-maul.name: Cloudbreaker Maul
cloudbreaker-maul.description: References to the Cloudbreaker Maul appear in some of the earliest documents found in the Rigland Archives, yet sketches of the inner workings of this impressive weapon hint at advanced mechanisms far beyond what was believed to be achievable at the time.

localization.name: Damage Down
localization.description: Reduces damage from enemy attacks by 7% as long as allies have 2 or less Spirit.

evening-star.name: Evening Star
evening-star.description: This legendary blade is said to have passed through the hands of every Cerulean Crestbearer in recorded history.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if this unit has defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

first-light.name: First Light
first-light.description: This legendary blade is said to have passed through the hands of every Crimson Crestbearer in recorded history.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks if the enemy has 1 or more units left than allies.

eruheart.name: Eruheart
eruheart.description: Some believe that life on Erden began when a meteorite struck the ground aeons ago. The blacksmith who forged this spear claimed it contains fragments of this instigator of primordial life. The truth of his statement is unverified, but there are many accounts of peculiar dreams of an empty planet had by those who have handled it.

localization.name: TU Cost Down
localization.description: 10% reduction to TU costs if 1 or more allies are at 150TU or more.

ibuki.name: Ibuki
ibuki.description: A katana forged in dragon fire. It is said no fire but that it was made in can melt it. A blade with great pride, Ibuki has been known to grow heavy and dull in the hands of an unworthy wielder.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units with Vengeance Strike type active skills.

luwing.name: Luwing
luwing.description: A fierce desire to protect draws Luwing, almost magnetically, to the throats of its wielder's enemies. This protection is not unconditional, though—Luwing will readily turn against the one who holds it if they fail to meet its high standards.

localization.name: Attack Up
localization.description: 15% bonus to attacks against units that have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield.

wyrmbane.name: Wyrmbane

When Gripknaw the dragon kidnapped Gila and forced her to play for him, Sarra forged the Wyrmbane and slew the great dragon of the north to rescue her.
